  "experiment_overview": "The experiment involves the analysis of different types of plastic films using a confocal microscope. The goal is to compare the surface properties and thickness of PET (Polyethylene Terephthalate), PMMA (Polymethylmethacrylate), and PVC (Polyvinyl Chloride) films.",
